highlights: Engineered platform reliability improvements achieving 99% health score through systematic technical debt reduction and architecting automated task table archival system that optimized 2M records down to 500K, ensuring platform scalability and performance.
Drove Agile transformation and platform standardization implementing Agile 2.0 with automated sprint dashboards, staged approval processes, and CI/CD to ensure platform best practices.

Designed and implemented enterprise-grade SPM platform migration from legacy change management system, demonstrating deep platform configuration expertise and securing contract extension through successful technical architecture and deployment.

Led team of developers to build an AI-powered platform optimization application (AERO) leveraging Now Create methodology to scan instances, identify outdated artifacts, and suggest automated fixes for technical debt reduction, exemplifying platform engineering excellence.

Architected scalable ITSM implementation framework for B2B market expansion, developing comprehensive technical specifications and statements of work that translate complex technical capabilities into clear business value propositions.
Designed and implemented a large-scale backend API to validate network security resources. Improved existing service by increasing supported resource types by 10x.
Continuously developed improvements to Typescript/React/NodeJS full-stack application that services entire network access organization and 1000s of network devices.
Acted as sole executor on native AWS application that automatically fetches, transforms, and visualizes internal ops data and metrics. Uses AWS Lambda, S3, Glue, Athena, and Quicksight.
Architected backend REST API for full-stack app that allows customers to track the deployment of their network changes across the entire global device network.
Developed and pushed new features using Vue.js for the Empath Agent platform, reaching over 30 million customers.
Experienced with platforms such as AWS, Jenkins pipelines, Splunk, JIRA, New Relic, and Docker.
Full ownership of two microservice containers, including platform maintenance, functional/integration tests, production releases and incident support.

projects.name: Libertum.io
projects.description: Built landing page for upcoming DeFi project using NextJS, NodeJS and TailwindCSS.

projects.name: LoL Colleagues
projects.description: Built and deployed web application using React.js that searches and displays match data for two usernames using League of Legends API.

projects.name: Spark Tweet Analyzer
projects.description: Built a Spark-powered Python application that analyzes sentiments of live Twitter posts using machine learning. Data is indexed using ElasticSearch and visualized using Kibana.

projects.name: Animal Cloud Device Connectivity
projects.description: Built a cloud-based architecture to connect and relay telehealth data from third party IoT devices, deployed using AWS IoT, DynamoDB, EC2 virtual instance, CloudWatch, and S3 buckets.

awards.title: ServiceNow CSA, CAD, CIS-ITSM Certifications
